beats: At the end of the basement, an old tape recorder sits with a red indicator light blinking.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 地下室尽头有一台旧录音机，红色指示灯正在闪。

prompt.positive: Close-up of an old tape recorder in a dark basement, red blinking indicator light, dusty surface, shallow depth of field, mysterious and tense mood, cool shadows with warm red accent.
